# Q2 2025 Digital Trust Index: AI Fraud

![pettern](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20684%20460'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

As GenAI becomes more accessible, fraudsters are weaponizing it to create scams that are faster, more scalable, and harder to detect. Sift’s Q2 2025 Digital Trust Index unpacks the impact of AI on fraud, consumer behavior, and digital trust.

**Read the report to learn about:**

*   **Scams on the Rise**: Scam content blocked by Sift rose 50% YoY, with 74% of consumers noticing an increase in spam and scams in the last year.
*   **Consumer Overconfidence**: 33% of consumers believe they can spot AI scams, but 20% were successfully phished last year.
*   **Fraudster Identity Signals**: Fraudsters use 36% more payment methods and 20% fewer IPs than trusted users.
*   **Smarter Solutions**: Learn how Sift’s AI-powered solutions unify data, detect anomalies, reduce friction, and stop fraud before it happens.

### Read the Report

Discover Data

## Dare to grow differently.

Flip the switch on fraud-fueled fear. Make risk work for your business and scale securely into new markets with Sift’s AI-powered platform.
